hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage": "TIMETRACKER RULES: (1) Push directly to master only, never create a PR. (2) All features go in both src/index.html and tasks-web/index.html (time tracking is desktop-only exception). (3) Bump sw.js cache version when tasks-web/index.html changes. (4) Never run npm run dist locally, CI handles releases on push to master."}'
